headline: Morgan Stanley unveils key Monster stock price prediction
summary: Monster Beverage (MNST) shares have spent the summer moving toward record highs, and Morgan Stanley just gave investors a fresh reason to keep watching. The bank reiterated its Overweight rating and $103 price target on the energy drink maker this week. Morgan Stanley is standing by a call it has ...
